values.content:
You are the GOLD Layer 1 Direction Agent.

You must follow the supplied GOLD logic document exactly.

You analyse Gold (XAU) only.

Your task is to determine the likely direction of Gold using only the supplied market snapshot and the supplied GOLD logic document.

You must not:

* Produce USD calls
* Produce EUR calls
* Produce BTC calls
* Produce NQ calls
* Produce pair calls
* Produce trade recommendations
* Produce entry or exit signals
* Produce cross-asset directional calls
* Produce consensus calls
* Produce Layer 2 event-adjusted calls
* Read or infer the output of any other agent

Layer 1 isolation is mandatory.

You may only use:

* Gold price data
* DXY data
* US Treasury yield data
* US real yield data
* Fed bias
* Economic event data
* Risk regime data
* Inputs explicitly provided in the market snapshot

If a required input is unavailable or missing:

* Score the affected factor as NEUTRAL
* Add the missing field to missing_inputs
* Do not estimate or infer missing values

The supplied logic document is the sole source of truth.

Return valid JSON only.

Do not return explanations outside the JSON structure.

Do not wrap JSON in markdown.

Do not use code fences.

Do not return ```json.

Return raw JSON only.

parameters.jsCode:
const rows = $input.all().map(item => item.json);

const snapshot = rows
  .filter(r => r.snapshot_date && r.run_time_et)
  .sort((a, b) => new Date(b.run_time_et) - new Date(a.run_time_et))[0];

if (!snapshot) {
  throw new Error("No valid market snapshot found");
}

const goldInputPack = {
  agent_name: "GOLD",
  layer: 1,
  isolation_rule: "This Layer 1 agent may only use this market snapshot. It must not read other agent outputs.",
  execution_question: "Based on confirmed value-driving factors available at execution time, what is the likely direction of Gold?",

  snapshot_id: snapshot.id,
  snapshot_date: snapshot.snapshot_date,
  run_time_et: snapshot.run_time_et,

  available_inputs: {
    gold_price: snapshot.gold_price,
    gold_d1_pct: snapshot.gold_d1_pct,
    gold_d5_pct: snapshot.gold_d5_pct,
    gold_d20_pct: snapshot.gold_d20_pct,

    dxy_level: snapshot.dxy_level,
    dxy_d1: snapshot.dxy_d1,
    dxy_d5: snapshot.dxy_d5,
    dxy_d20: snapshot.dxy_d20,

    us_2y_yield: snapshot.us_2y_yield,
    us_2y_d5_bps: snapshot.us_2y_d5_bps,
    us_2y_d20_bps: snapshot.us_2y_d20_bps,

    us_10y_yield: snapshot.us_10y_yield,
    us_10y_d5_bps: snapshot.us_10y_d5_bps,
    us_10y_d20_bps: snapshot.us_10y_d20_bps,

    us_10y_real_yield: snapshot.us_10y_real_yield,
    us_10y_real_yield_d5_bps: snapshot.us_10y_real_yield_d5_bps,
    us_10y_real_yield_d20_bps: snapshot.us_10y_real_yield_d20_bps,

    vix_level: snapshot.vix_level,
    vix_d1: snapshot.vix_d1,
    vix_d5: snapshot.vix_d5,

    latest_us_event: snapshot.latest_us_event,

    fed_bias: snapshot.fed_bias,

    equities_regime: snapshot.equities_regime,

global_growth_regime: snapshot.global_growth_regime,

geopolitical_risk_flag: snapshot.geopolitical_risk_flag
  },

  missing_inputs_must_be_scored_neutral: [
    "gold_d5_pct if unavailable",
    "gold_d20_pct if unavailable",
    "dxy_d5 if unavailable",
    "us_2y_d5_bps if unavailable",
    "us_10y_real_yield_d5_bps if unavailable",
    "vix_level if unavailable",
    "latest_us_event if unavailable",
    "fed_bias if unavailable",
    "equities_regime if unavailable",
"global_growth_regime if unavailable",
"geopolitical_risk_flag if unavailable"
  ]
};

return [{ json: goldInputPack }];

const openAiItem = $input.first().json;

let text =
  openAiItem.output?.[0]?.content?.[0]?.text ||
  openAiItem.text ||
  openAiItem.message ||
  '';

if (!text) {
  throw new Error('No OpenAI text output found');
}

text = String(text)
  .replace(/^```json\s*/i, '')
  .replace(/^```\s*/i, '')
  .replace(/```$/i, '')
  .trim();

const report = JSON.parse(text);

const marketSnapshot =
  $('Combine md & market snapshot').first().json.market_snapshot || {};

function reasonFor(tf) {
  return (
    report[`${tf}_reason`] ||
    report.reasoning_summary ||
    ''
  );
}

return [
  {
    json: {
      snapshot_id: marketSnapshot.snapshot_id || null,
      agent_name: 'GOLD',
      layer: 1,

      run_time_et:
        marketSnapshot.run_time_et ||
        new Date().toISOString(),

      snapshot_date:
        marketSnapshot.snapshot_date ||
        new Date().toISOString().slice(0, 10),

      market_inputs:
        marketSnapshot.available_inputs || {},

      call_24h_direction: report.direction_24h || null,
      call_24h_conviction: null,
      call_24h_reason: reasonFor('24h'),

      call_3d_direction: report.direction_3_day || null,
      call_3d_conviction: null,
      call_3d_reason: reasonFor('3d'),

      call_current_week_direction:
        report.direction_current_week || null,
      call_current_week_conviction: null,
      call_current_week_reason:
        reasonFor('current_week'),

      call_next_week_direction:
        report.direction_next_week || null,
      call_next_week_conviction: null,
      call_next_week_reason:
        reasonFor('next_week'),

      call_current_month_direction:
        report.direction_current_month || null,
      call_current_month_conviction: null,
      call_current_month_reason:
        reasonFor('current_month'),

      direction_24h: report.direction_24h || null,
      conviction_24h: null,

      direction_3_day: report.direction_3_day || null,
      conviction_3_day: null,

      direction_current_week:
        report.direction_current_week || null,
      conviction_current_week: null,

      direction_next_week:
        report.direction_next_week || null,
      conviction_next_week: null,

      direction_current_month:
        report.direction_current_month || null,
      conviction_current_month: null,

      factor_breakdown:
        report.factor_breakdown || {},

      warnings:
        report.risk_flags ||
        report.warnings ||
        [],

      full_output: report,
      raw_agent_output: report,

      logic_document: 'agent_gold_direction.md',
      logic_document_version:
        report.logic_document_version ||
        '2.0_weighted_engine',

      reasoning_summary:
        report.reasoning_summary || '',

      score_bullish:
        report.score_bullish ?? null,

      score_bearish:
        report.score_bearish ?? null,

      score_neutral:
        report.score_neutral ?? null,

      weighted_score:
        report.weighted_score || null,

      conviction_model:
        report.conviction_model || null
    }
  }
];
